record.comment: Sec. 9A as added Pub. L. 115-141, div. P., title I, sec. 102(c), Mar. 23, 2018, 132 Stat. 1084. Trigger statute not available in list.
Sec. 13 as added Pub. L. 115?141, div. P, title IV, sec. 401, Mar. 23, 2018, 132 Stat. 1087. Trigger statute not available.
As added Pub. Law 115-129, sec. 2, 132 Stat. 329.
As added Pub. L. 115-127, sec. 2(a), 132 Stat. 326.
As added Pub. L. 115-232, sec. 1085, 132 Stat. 1991.
